x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Borrower Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: An account owned by the customer (borrower) that records the loan obligation and/or is used to make repayments (principal and interest).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Lender Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: An account owned by the bank (lender) that records the loan as an asset, including outstanding principal, accrued interest, and earned income.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Third-Party Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: An account used for home insurance payment, property tax payments, property transafer and rigistration fees
